image_prompt: A vibrant underwater scene with a group of colorful, cartoon-style fish looking utterly bewildered and confused as they try to walk on tiny human legs on the ocean floor, bumping into each other. One fish, looking exasperated, is pointing at another fish that is gracefully swimming past them, looking proud. The text "Peixe nada." is displayed prominently in bubbles floating upwards, or as if written on a submerged sign. Playful, bright, and humorous.
caption: Exclusivo: peixes não voam! 😱 (A não ser que sejam peixe-voador, mas isso é outra história!) 🐠 Eles preferem dar um mergulho! Qual o seu lugar preferido para nadar? 🌊 #PeixeNada #VidaMarinha #FatosCuriosos #ObvioMasVerdadeiro #Subaquático
